# Albatros Tenerife Real Estate

> Real estate agency specialising in apartment sales, rentals, and property management at Park Albatros Resort in Golf del Sur, Tenerife, Spain.

## About

Albatros Tenerife is a boutique real estate agency operating exclusively within Park Albatros Resort — a gated residential complex of 310 apartments located in Golf del Sur, San Miguel de Abona, Tenerife (Canary Islands, Spain). The agency is run by Ivan Uher, a licensed real estate advisor with deep knowledge of the local market.

The resort offers a heated pool, landscaped gardens, on-site dining, and 24/7 reception. It is popular with holidaymakers, retirees, and investors from Central and Eastern Europe.

## Services

- **Apartment Sales** — buying and selling apartments within Park Albatros Resort; full transaction support including legal checks, notary coordination, and post-sale assistance.
- **Long-term Rentals** — placing tenants in owner-held apartments; rental contract management, tenant screening.
- **Holiday Rentals** — short-term rental management for investment owners; listing, guest communication, cleaning coordination.
- **Property Management** — on-site management for non-resident owners; maintenance, utility payments, key holding.
- **Valuations** — market appraisals for sale or rental pricing.
- **Inquiry Form** — buyers can submit a property search request specifying budget, size, and preferences.

## Properties

All listings are apartments within Park Albatros Resort. Typical properties: studios and one/two-bedroom apartments. Price range: from approx. €80,000 (studio) to €200,000+ (two-bedroom with sea view). Available for sale and for long-term rent.

Property detail pages include: photos, description, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, area (m²), property type, status (for sale / for rent), labels (reserved / sold / rented), virtual tour link where available.

## Location

Park Albatros Resort
Golf del Sur, San Miguel de Abona
Tenerife, Canary Islands, Spain

Golf del Sur is a golf and residential community on the south coast of Tenerife, approximately 15 minutes from Tenerife South Airport (TFS). The area has a warm, dry climate year-round.

## Languages

The website is fully available in six languages:
- English (default, no URL prefix) — albatrostenerife.com
- Czech — albatrostenerife.com/cs/
- Polish — albatrostenerife.com/pl/
- Hungarian — albatrostenerife.com/hu/
- Italian — albatrostenerife.com/it/
- Spanish — albatrostenerife.com/es/

## Blog

The blog covers topics relevant to buyers and owners: buying process in Spain, NIE number, taxes, residency, property management tips, life in Tenerife, activities, and local area guides.

## Contact

- **WhatsApp / Phone:** available on the contact page
- **Email:** info@albatrostenerife.com
- **Response time:** typically same day, including evenings and weekends

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://albatrostenerife.com/) — overview, featured listings, services, reviews
- [Listings](https://albatrostenerife.com/listings/) — all available apartments for sale and rent
- [Contact](https://albatrostenerife.com/contact/) — contact form, phone, email, address
- [Inquiry Form](https://albatrostenerife.com/inquiry-form/) — submit a property search request
- [Blog](https://albatrostenerife.com/blog/) — articles about buying in Tenerife, living in Golf del Sur, property investment
